summary: CONSTITUTIONAL CHECKS: ALL 4 PASS — Cantonal (observation: suppression_registry is second CANONICAL in LCS, but defensible — distinct governance surface for suppression vs lifecycle state, WP explicitly requested CANONICAL; lcs_canonical+lcs_errors cantonal pair intact), Registry-First (CTB pre-registration at Section 1 line 32 before CREATE TABLE at Section 2 line 44), Sovereign ID (no minting — sovereign_id is FK from cl.company_identity, fn_mid_suppression_check resolves from mid_ledger), No sideways calls (reads only lcs.mid_ledger + lcs.suppression_registry; FK to cl.company_identity is DDL referential constraint not runtime read). ENVELOPE: PASS — all 4 fields match (change_type=feature, architectural_flag=false, doctrine_version=2.8.0). SCOPE: PASS — 2 modified paths within migrations/ and tests/. No protected assets touched. EXECUTION: PASS — all 6 acceptance criteria met. (1) suppression_registry created as sovereign-scoped CANONICAL: sovereign_id UUID PK with FK to cl.company_identity(company_unique_id), global_suppressed BOOLEAN NOT NULL DEFAULT FALSE, suppression_reason TEXT, suppressed_at/cooldown_until TIMESTAMPTZ, created_at/updated_at. CTB registered as CANONICAL before table creation. (2) UPDATE allowed (no restrictions — governance surface). DELETE blocked by trg_suppression_registry_no_delete trigger. (3) fn_mid_suppression_check(uuid) replaced from stub to real implementation. Returns BOOLEAN. No RAISE anywhere — all 5 paths use RETURN TRUE/FALSE. Pure read-only, no side effects. (4) Five deterministic rules: global_suppressed=TRUE→FALSE, cooldown_until>NOW()→FALSE, no registry row→TRUE, not suppressed+expired cooldown→TRUE, MID not found→FALSE (safe default). (5) fn_mark_mid_ready unchanged — already calls fn_mid_suppression_check from Phase 3A. Interface preserved (UUID→BOOLEAN). Stub replacement IS the update. Phase 3A SUPPRESSION error path handles FALSE with INSERT into lcs_errors + RETURN cleanly. (6) 11 tests across 3 categories: suppression_registry structure (4 — exists, CTB CANONICAL, delete blocked, update allowed), fn_mid_suppression_check behavior (5 — suppressed→FALSE, cooldown active→FALSE, not suppressed→TRUE, no row→TRUE, cooldown expired→TRUE), readiness integration (2 — fn_mark_mid_ready denied when suppressed with error log verification, denied when cooldown active with state preservation). OBSERVATIONS: (1) Second CANONICAL in LCS is non-traditional but defensible for distinct governance surface. (2) Safe default: unknown MID→FALSE blocks dispatch for invalid MIDs. (3) Phase 3A untestable-suppression-path observation now RESOLVED by readiness integration tests. (4) Tests clean up via UPDATE not DELETE. pytest.skip for no_registry_row test if all sovereigns have rows. (5) Partial index note correct: NOW() is volatile, cannot be in index predicate — cooldown filtering done in-function.
